channel.title: Lore on The Moonshroud Realms
channel.description: Recent content in Lore on The Moonshroud Realms

item.title: The Gods
item.description:
The Gods#

The divine order of the Moonshroud Realms flows from a single source: Spherus, the creator, who imagined nine Eternals into being at the founding of the world. The Eternals are not gods in the conventional sense — they are fundamental forces given will and purpose, each responsible for a domain of reality rather than a nation of worshippers.

Beneath the Eternals exist the Ascendants — beings of mortal origin who were elevated to divinity through extraordinary deeds, divine selection, or profound sacrifice. Ascendants are more accessible to mortal understanding than the Eternals, and their stories are told in temples, around fires, and in the songs of traveling bards.

item.title: The Seven Moons
item.description:
The Seven Moons of Orb#

The world of Orb turns beneath seven moons. Every person who has ever looked up at a clear night sky has seen them — some bright, some faint, some moving faster than others across the dark. There is always at least one large moon reflecting the light of Krotar, the star at the center of the solar system, which means true darkness is rare in the Moonshroud Realms. Most nights are silvered by at least one significant presence overhead.

item.title: The World Beyond
item.description:
The World Beyond Bridgeport#

Bridgeport sits at the mouth of the Godsfall River on the western coast of Algar, one nation among many on the continent of Elderland. It is a busy, prosperous city — and it is also a very small part of a very large world.

The Continent of Elderland#

Elderland is the known world for most of its inhabitants. It is vast enough that few people ever see more than a fraction of it in a lifetime, and large enough that its eastern reaches are more legend than geography to those living on the western coast.
